Frequently Asked Questions
1. Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 20 July 2026.
2.Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course 2026 Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in As per Schedule .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course 2026 Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course 2026 Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Indian Army NCC Special Entry Scheme 125th Course Online Form 2026 Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 20 August 2026..
6. What is the last date to Pay application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 20 August 2026 .

Short Information

Join Indian Army has released the NCC Special Entry Course batch April 2027 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Army NCC Special Entry Recruitment 2026 Exam can Apply Online from 20 July 2026 to 20 August 2026 . Read the notification for Army NCC 125th Batch Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.

Army NCC 125th Course Entry Notification 2026 : Age Limit Details As on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 19 Years Maximum Age : 25 Years Age as per Indian Army NCC Special Entry 125th Course Entry Exam Rules.
